steps.title: Identify what a contrasting statement must do
steps.content: To contrast means to highlight differences. The correct choice must explicitly show how the NiTi wire and natural rubber differ using information from the notes.

steps.title: Find which choice actually contrasts
steps.content:
Choice A directly contrasts by stating the rubber sample is thicker than the NiTi wire (2.2 mm versus 0.7 mm).

Choices B, C, and D fail to show differences—they mention both without distinguishing them, emphasize what both samples share, or omit the samples entirely.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
